name: MOONLIGHT MILE
title: MOONLIGHT MILE
overview_en: After scaling Mt Everest mountain climbing partners Saruwatari Gorou and Lostman Jack F Woodbridge see the ISA Space Station and each vows to make the trek into outerspace When Helium 3 a new energy source is discovered on the moon NASA forms a new project named Nexus to harness that energy for use on earth This is the story of the two and the paths they take to see their dream become a reality in the quest to harness the next generation energy source

original_name: ラブライブ! School idol project
name: ラブライブ! School idol project
title: ラブライブ School idol project
overview_en: Otonokizaka High School is planning to close within three years However nine female students come together with one thing in mind form a pop idol group to revive the school s popularity and keep it from shutting down In order to protect our beloved school there s only one thing we can do become pop stars

original_name: 機甲猟兵メロウリンク
name: 機甲猟兵メロウリンク
title: 機甲猟兵メロウリンク
overview_en: Armor Hunter Merowlink was a twelve episode anime OVA spinoff of Armored Trooper VOTOMS It takes place in the same universe as VOTOMS but the two stories are entirely independent of each other Merowlink is the story of a soldier whose unit is sacrificed on the battlefield for reasons unknown Although he was not meant to survive the main character Merowlink Ality manages to survive only to be framed for a crime he did not commit Merowlink escapes his captors and begins hunting down his former commanding officers both to get revenge for his dead platoon members and to find out the nature of the conspiracy that led to their death
